title: IIM Raipur Research Associate / Data Analyst/Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur)
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Associate / Data Analyst/Project Scientist Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, Operations Research, Mathematics, Business Analytics, or equivalent disciplines from a recognized/reputed or university, with First Class or equivalent grade and a consistently strong academic record throughout.
qualification.details: Master’s degree in Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, Operations Research, Mathematics, Business Analytics, or equivalent disciplines from a recognized/reputed or university, with First Class or equivalent grade and a consistently strong academic record throughout.

selection_process: Written test and/or personal interview of the shortlisted candidates only
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
